title: Multiply by 4
description: Multiply 4 times a number less than or equal to 10.

assessment_items.question_content:
The image shows $4$ groups of $2$ magic wands.

![4 groups of 2](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/60da7b67c7c689793af70492333b2a78ce6db3d7)

**Multiply.**

$4 \times 2 = $ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
There are $\maroonD{4}$ groups of $\blueD{2}$.

![Same image with each group labeled, plus 2](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6650b04ace55579975edbd86c7f5fa796ff0a4ab)
